item.title: Hubble vs. Webb
item.description: Southern Ring Nebula (NGC 3132) Webb is amazing. What a time to be alive. Note: it's not a competition, just a comparison. Hubble opened the door that Webb has gone through.

item.title: Welcome to Gilead ....
item.description: They kept telling us we were overreacting when we said they would repeal Roe. Till now they are telling us we're overreacting when we say they will ban birth control. Fact is, many of the "rights" that people think they have are not specifically listed in the Constitution. And it's just a matter of time ....

item.title: AOC calls out Nancy Mace on braggadocio and deception re: her serving on a civil rights sub-committee. Sounds sweet.
item.description: Nancy Mace using flowery words takes great pride in the civil rights sub committee she served on under Jamie Raskin. AOC points out that all of Nancys flowery words cover up the fact that Nancy disbanded the civil rights sub committee

item.title: Images of Note: are you tired of being human
item.description:
* B O N K *
FUCK YOU MORRIS YOU LEAVE LEO ALONE!
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tarrare
https://www.libreoffice.org/
Yes. This is a real thing
*Tries again and hits him again* AH FUCK!
moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon! moon!
a baby!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I’m exhausted
item.description: Shouting into the void. I was an educator for a decade in design. I have so many skills ranging from graphic design, exhibition design, ux/ui design, and human centered design. I have lead huge projects and mentored hundreds of humans around the world. I even have a TEDtalk. And yet I can’t even get a real human to look at my CV. I just want to work again. I want to make money and have health insurance again. If you read this far. Thank you. Shout out to you all. Love you Imgur. Thanks for the laughs and keeping me up with the world.
item.dc:creator: neoswhiterabbitt

item.title: RI Officials Catch GOP and No Labels Party in Ballot Fraud
item.description: "Miguel J. Nunez, the Board of Elections’ deputy director of elections, sent local boards a message Wednesday, saying the Coventry Board of Canvassers had “invalidated an unusually high number of signatures on the nomination papers submitted on behalf of presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, which were collected by Heidy Moore and Michael Michols. Please vigilant when processing forms collected by these individuals, and contact me if you believe any contain a pattern of fraudulent signatures.” Also, Nunez wrote, “We have also been notified by the staff of the Warwick Board of Canvassers of several deceased voters on the nomination papers submitted on behalf of presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy.” And, he said, “We have also been notified by the staff of the Cranston Board of Canvassers that they have found names of several deceased voters on petitions from the No Labels Rhode Island Party. Likewise, please notify me if you observe any patterns of fraudulent signatures on these petitions.” Smith, the board spokesperson, explained that the No Labels Rhode Island Party is trying to get on the Rhode Island ballot for the first time and faces a separate deadline in August. He said both Cranston and Jamestown election officials have invalidated an unusually large number of signatures on No Labels petitions. The deadline for presidential candidates to submit nomination papers to the local boards of canvassers is 4 p.m. Thursday. But earlier this week, some Republican candidates have been struggling to gather more than the 1,000 valid signatures required to appear on the April 2 ballot in Rhode Island."
item.dc:creator: hufflesnuff

item.title: Something something work work work
item.description: 100+ applications sent out over the last year - 2 interviews - 0 new jobs - Not sure what the industry wants but it is not a principal engineer with over 15 years of experience. See previous colleagues picking up jobs months ago but still here with nothing. I am very lucky that I can just stay home so have been spending time getting back in shape, running marathons, pushing a sub-5 minute mile I am in better shape than I was in the military. Only wish I could actually find some income but after this year I have no desire to work in tech again and happy to stay home. Stay safe out there friends it is rough out here FP EDIT!! - Pls send cat pics, I love cats and thank you have a wonderful day!
item.dc:creator: somethingrandomprobablyforgetanyway

item.title: Ice caps not melting fast enough? How about we sell them to rich assholes for their cocktails?
